converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
World War II servicemen alumni files
Cornell University. Public Affairs Records
41-2-822
3 cubic feet. 3 cubic feet.
1939-1945. Correspondence, newspapers, photographs Correspondence, photographs, clippings, and biographical data concerning Cornell University alumni who died during World War II. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 2: GOODMAN-OL 3: OLN-Z ======= 2: GOODMAN-OL 3: OLN-Z >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 6325118
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Eileen Keating
Date completed:
August 7, 2008
EAD encoding:
Rebecca Keating, August 7, 2008
Last update:
RMC Staff, September 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, photographs, clippings, and biographical data concerning Cornell University alumni who died during World War II.
RELATED MATERIALS
For all other alumni, see Cornell deceased alumni files, #41-2-877.
Cite As:
World War II servicemen alumni files, #41-2-822. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
World War, 1939-1945 -- Casualties. World War, 1939-1945. Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae.
